items.title: VW board reportedly plans to close four German plants
items.summary: According to a report by Manager Magazin , Volkswagen is considering a far more extensive restructuring programme than previously reported. The German business magazine claims the company is planning to close its plants in Hanover, Zwickau and Emden, as well as Audi's factory in Neckarsulm. The report also states that Volkswagen could cut up to 100,000 jobs worldwide.

items.title: Polestar faces US sales ban for new models from 2027
items.summary: Polestar will no longer be able to offer new vehicles in the US market starting from the 2027 model year. This follows a decision by the US Department of Commerce not to grant the electric vehicle manufacturer an exemption under the so-called Connected Vehicle Rule.
